channel.title: Anthropic News
channel.description: Latest news and announcements from Anthropic

item.title: Anthropic invests $100 million into the Claude Partner Network
item.description: Anthropic invests $100 million into the Claude Partner Network

item.title: Australian government and Anthropic sign MOU for AI safety and research
item.description: Australian government and Anthropic sign MOU for AI safety and research

item.title: Anthropic expands partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation compute
item.description: Anthropic expands partnership with Google and Broadcom for multiple gigawatts of next-generation compute

item.title: Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust appoints Vas Narasimhan to Board of Directors
item.description: Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust appoints Vas Narasimhan to Board of Directors

item.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
item.description: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs

item.title: Anthropic and Amazon expand collaboration for up to 5 gigawatts of new compute
item.description: Anthropic and Amazon expand collaboration for up to 5 gigawatts of new compute

item.title: Anthropic and NEC collaborate to build Japan’s largest AI engineering workforce
item.description: Anthropic and NEC collaborate to build Japan’s largest AI engineering workforce

item.title: An update on our election safeguards
item.description: An update on our election safeguards

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: Our latest Opus model brings stronger performance across coding, agents, vision, and multi-step tasks, with greater thoroughness and consistency on the work that matters most.

item.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
item.description: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.

item.title: Claude is a space to think
item.description: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.
